suite.name: ozonesecure-fcq

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.
kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Pass Execution If
kw.doc: Conditionally skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Get Variable Value
kw.doc: Returns variable value or ``default`` if the variable does not exist.

kw.name: Get Regexp Matches
kw.doc: Returns a list of all non-overlapping matches in the given string.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output

kw.msg: ${output} = * Uses proxy env variable no_proxy == 'om,scm,recon,s3g,kdc,localhost,127.0.0.1' * Trying 172.18.0.9:9874... * Connected to om (172.18.0.9) port 9874 (#0) * Server auth using Negotiate with user '' ...

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: * Uses proxy env variable no_proxy == 'om,scm,recon,s3g,kdc,localhost,127.0.0.1' * Trying 172.18.0.9:9874... * Connected to om (172.18.0.9) port 9874 (#0) * Server auth using Negotiate with user '' > HEAD /jmx HTTP/1.1 > Host: om:9874 > Authorization: Negotiate  > User-Agent: curl/7.76.1 > Accept: */* > * Mark bundle as not supporting multiuse < HTTP/1.1 200 OK < Date: Tue, 03 Mar 2026 15:25:07 GMT < Cache-Control: no-cache < Expires: Tue, 03 Mar 2026 15:25:07 GMT < Pragma: no-cache < Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf8 < X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff < X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block < X-FRAME-OPTIONS: SAMEORIGIN < WWW-Authenticate: Negotiate oYGFMIGCoAMKAQChCwYJKoZIhvcSAQICom4EbGBqBgkqhkiG9xIBAgICAG9bMFmgAwIBBaEDAgEPok0wS6ADAgESokQEQobdCE0ABA81BSrdWEfx/nMNqc5SSg5GUL7KwVXTeOIjwhZSqw0UiQAFm23dEFf4Y2Z5eG9k+jWHrVOqDQ80diXrJg== < Set-Cookie: hadoop.auth="u=HTTP&p=HTTP/s3g@EXAMPLE.COM&t=kerberos&e=1772587507430&s=+rP1fnXYTTZlPQfJwFnHQc1vxL187i1Gl5LitO8jnXg="; Path=/; HttpOnly < Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET < Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * < Content-Length: 419879 < * Connection #0 to host om left intact HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Tue, 03 Mar 2026 15:25:07 GMT Cache-Control: no-cache Expires: Tue, 03 Mar 2026 15:25:07 GMT Pragma: no-cache Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf8 X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block X-FRAME-OPTIONS: SAMEORIGIN WWW-Authenticate: Negotiate oYGFMIGCoAMKAQChCwYJKoZIhvcSAQICom4EbGBqBgkqhkiG9xIBAgICAG9bMFmgAwIBBaEDAgEPok0wS6ADAgESokQEQobdCE0ABA81BSrdWEfx/nMNqc5SSg5GUL7KwVXTeOIjwhZSqw0UiQAFm23dEFf4Y2Z5eG9k+jWHrVOqDQ80diXrJg== Set-Cookie: hadoop.auth="u=HTTP&p=HTTP/s3g@EXAMPLE.COM&t=kerberos&e=1772587507430&s=+rP1fnXYTTZlPQfJwFnHQc1vxL187i1Gl5LitO8jnXg="; Path=/; HttpOnly Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Content-Length: 419879

kw.msg: Running command 'ozone freon s3kg -e http://s3g:9878 -t 10 -n 1000 -p s3bg 2>&1'.
